title: Parker Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
text: CLEVELAND, Aug. 17, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Parker Hannifin Corporation (NYSE: PH), the global leader in motion and control technologies, today announced that its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $1.48 per share of common stock to shareholders of record as of August 28, 2023. The dividend is payable September 8, 2023.

title: Parker-Hannifin Is An Industrial Gem
text: Parker-Hannifin continues to thrive despite industrial recession risks, thanks to strong revenue and margin growth and strategic acquisitions. Industrial North America and aerospace systems are safe growth areas with international markets set to rebound from currency headwinds. Reshoring manufacturing and Meggitt look to be major industrial drivers in the long term.

title: Parker-Hannifin (PH) Beats Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Parker-Hannifin (PH) came out with quarterly earnings of $6.08 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $5.50 per share. This compares to earnings of $5.16 per share a year ago.

title: Parker Reports Fiscal 2023 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results and Issues Guidance for Fiscal 2024
text: Fiscal 2023 Fourth Quarter Highlights: -     Sales increased 22% to a record of $5.1 billion; organic sales increased 6% -     Total segment operating margin was 22.1% , or a record 24.0% adjusted -     EPS were $5.44 , or a record of $6.08 adjusted -     Debt reduction of $846 million in the quarter
